title: HW #10 - Q14 Issue
content:
Hi Class,

On Homework assignment #10 Q14 asks a question pertaining to bond issuance costs.

We did not discuss this in class this semester - you can leave this blank and I will add the points back to your assignment after the homework deadline.

Best,

Jeremiah
